overview: Advanced Hormone Solutions provides individualized health evaluations and bioidentical hormone replacement therapy, specializing in BHRT, sexual health, and functional medicine. The practice uses nutritional, supplemental, and hormonal strategies to address root causes of health issues rather than symptom management.
highlights: PRP procedures including penile and vaginal rejuvenation
Comprehensive lab analysis and nutrition counseling
targetAudience: Men and women in central Ohio seeking functional medicine approaches to hormone optimization and sexual health.
